description: Detects potential memory leaks in TypeScript: addEventListener without corresponding removeEventListener, setInterval without clearInterval, unbounded array growth (.push/.unshift in loops). Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes with member_expression function (cannot filter to only addEventListener/setInterval or verify cleanup patterns elsewhere in the file without #match? predicate support). All member expression calls flagged -- higher false positive rate than Rust version.

flag.message: Member expression call detected -- verify addEventListener calls have corresponding removeEventListener and setInterval calls have corresponding clearInterval
